headline: Nvidia Is Building The Brain — Palantir May Control The $50 Trillion Physical AI System
summary: The AI story is changing. For the past two years, it's been about models, chatbots, and copilots. But as Nvidia Corp CEO Jensen Huang recently framed it, the real opportunity ahead isn't digital—it's physical. Robots, autonomous vehicles, factories, logistics systems. A market he pegs at $50 trillion. And that shift is starting to redraw the AI stack. At the center of it is Nvidia. But just as important may be what sits atop it. Nvidia Builds The Brain Nvidia's role in AI is already well underst

headline: Pentagon to adopt Palantir's Maven AI system, oil prices fall
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Monday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories. Oil (CL=F, BZ=F) prices are still falling on easing fears of US–Iran escalation. Palantir (PLTR) stock is moving higher on reports that the Pentagon has plans to adopt Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence (AI) system.

content.title: Pentagon to adopt Palantir's Maven AI system, oil prices fall
content.description:
Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Monday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories.

Oil (CL=F, BZ=F) prices are still falling on easing fears of US–Iran escalation.

Palantir (PLTR) stock is moving higher on reports that the Pentagon has plans to adopt Palantir's Maven artificial intelligence (AI) system.
